jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Wrogn - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Wrogn! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Wrogn:
Wrogn is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wrogn!
